ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "ms_subclass" INTEGER /* Type of dwelling (e.g., Single-family homes) */,
  "ms_zoning" TEXT /* Zoning classification for the property */,
  "lot_frontage" REAL /* Width of the lot in feet */,
  "lot_area" INTEGER /* Total area of the lot in square feet */,
  "street" TEXT /* Type of street access */,
  "alley" TEXT /* Type of alley access */,
  "lot_shape" TEXT /* Shape of the lot */,
  "land_contour" TEXT /* Contour of the land */,
  "utilities" TEXT /* Type of utilities available */,
  "lot_config" TEXT /* Configuration of the lot */,
  "pool_qc" TEXT /* Quality of the pool */,
  "fence" TEXT /* Type of fence present */,
  "misc_feature" TEXT /* Additional features of the property */,
  "misc_val" INTEGER /* Value of miscellaneous features */,
  "architectural_style" TEXT /* Style of the property's architecture */,
  "num_bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "num_bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "total_sqft" INTEGER /* Total square footage of the living area */,
  "has_basement" INTEGER /* Whether the property has a basement */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the property is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the property is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the property's location */,
  "property_status" TEXT /* Current status of the property (e.g., active, sold, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property being sold */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Final sale price of the property */,
  "mo_sold" INTEGER /* Month when the sale occurred */,
  "yr_sold" INTEGER /* Year when the sale occurred */,
  "sale_type" TEXT /* Type of sale (e.g., warranty deed) */,
  "sale_condition" TEXT /* Condition of sale (e.g., normal sale, abnormal sale) */,
  "sale_type_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the sale type */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client who purchased the property */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the agent who facilitated the sale */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission earned by the agent on the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the agent */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the agent */,
  "agency" TEXT /* The agency the agent belongs to */,
  "total_sales" INTEGER /* Total number of sales made by the agent */,
  "total_commission" REAL /* Total commission earned by the agent */,
  "agent_rating" REAL /* Rating of the agent based on client feedback */,
  "agent_type" TEXT /* Type of agent (residential, commercial, both) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Full name of the client */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the client */,
  "preferred_contact_method" TEXT /* Preferred method of contact (e.g., email, phone) */,
  "preferred_property_type" TEXT /* Type of property the client is interested in */,
  "budget_range" TEXT /* Client's budget range for the property */,
  "desired_location" TEXT /* Client's desired location for the property */,
  "client_status" TEXT /* Current status of the client (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view event */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being viewed */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client viewing the property */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date when the property was viewed */,
  "view_type" TEXT /* Type of view (online or offline) */,
  "view_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the view in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_views_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_views_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "sale_trend" TEXT /* Sales trend data (e.g., increasing, decreasing) */,
  "market_insight" TEXT /* Market insight (e.g., factors affecting sales) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the analytics data was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "sale_performance" TEXT /* Sales performance data (e.g., total sales, revenue) */,
  "agent_metrics" TEXT /* Agent metrics (e.g., top-performing agents) */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
